text: Thanks for the video. I have just one question. That is let's say I see some of the data, the September data that you get to see in the ads report. It's messed up, let's say sponsored ads report. So my question is how do I like let's say I want to remove the data that I have for the month of September and then upload them again. So how do I do that? Do I delete everything like you see? How do I do it? Do they delete it from here on the dashboard, this back end data or do I go to the drive folder and then identify which files had the September month's data, delete those and then re upload the new files? How does that work? I think if you just show me that do not change anything in the dashboard but if you show me how that works I'll be able to do it on my end. Thank you.
